text: I find myself engulfed by a sense of curiosity mixed with disorientation. The glass-walled room and the bold, modern design on the walls stimulate my intellect, inviting inquiry. The phrases about confusion and experimentation resonate with me, evoking a feeling of playful uncertainty. I feel like both an observer and a participant, questioning my role in this space designed for research and development. There is a tingling excitement in not fully knowing my purpose here—an acceptance that meaning might only emerge through experience.
